text: Bringing a new pet home is one of life's quiet joys. There will be moments of adjustment, a little chaos, maybe a chewed shoe or two, but mostly there will be a bond that grows steadily into something you cannot imagine having lived without. Animals have a way of making a home feel more alive, and they give their trust and affection so wholeheartedly. Wishing you and your new companion many happy, unhurried years together.
